content: {"brand":{"name":"Labs Institute","tagline":"Founded For The Future","desc":"We manage, develop, and promote emerging and established DJs in the underground electronic music scene.","values":"Reputation, Transparency, Reinvestment, Family, Value","about":"Labs Institute was founded to give underground DJs what the industry doesn't — transparency, reinvestment, and a structured path from open-deck nights to headline slots. Every penny of commission goes back into artist development, better events, and building a community that lasts."},"kpis":[{"value":"54K","label":"Instagram Reach"},{"value":"2M+","label":"Track Streams"},{"value":"10+","label":"Countries Played"},{"value":"6","label":"Labels Released On"}],"roster":[{"name":"Luciid","genre":"Hard Techno / Schranz","tier":"established","gigs":11,"ig":"54.0K","fee":"—"}],"services":[{"name":"Artist Management","desc":"Career strategy, brand development, day-to-day management"},{"name":"Booking Agency","desc":"Securing gigs, negotiating fees, managing the pipeline"},{"name":"Event Promotion","desc":"Planning, marketing, and running events"},{"name":"Social Media","desc":"Content strategy, posting schedule, audience growth"},{"name":"DJ Development","desc":"Mentoring emerging talent: skills, exposure, progression"},{"name":"Content Production","desc":"Mix recording, photography, video, press kits"}],"generated_at":"2026-05-23T12:12:44.606Z"}

MVP site must have 5 pages: Home (hero+KPIs+dual CTA), Artists (roster grid), Artist Profile (/artists/luciid with timeline+stats+releases+embeds), About (origin+values+with-vs-without comparison), Contact (split DJ application + promoter booking forms)

Artist profiles should combine narrative bio with hard metrics (streams, followers, venues) - this is the pattern that converts best, used by RFYN and Primary Talent. Story + Stats + Social Proof + Activity.
Two conversion funnels: DJ funnel (Home?Artists?Profile?Apply form) and Promoter funnel (Home?Roster?Profile?Booking Inquiry). Each step needs proof of value to move visitors forward.
Standard UK artist management commission is ~10% of gross booking fees. Labs should frame as outcome-based: 'We only succeed if you succeed'. Show With Labs vs Without Labs comparison on About page.
Static or hybrid site generated from JSON gives best performance and SEO. 53% of mobile users abandon after 3 seconds. Lazy-load SoundCloud/Spotify embeds below the fold.

Admin CMS should be guided form-driven editing with plain-language fields, not raw WYSIWYG. Collapsible sections, inline help text, conditional logic to hide empty sections. Minimise decision fatigue.
Target SEO keywords: 'DJ management Manchester', 'book underground techno DJ UK', 'artist management underground'. Use in page titles, H1s, meta descriptions. Register Google Business profile.
Reserve /dashboard URL path for future portals. Use /artists/[slug] for artist pages. Structure content as page templates so new features slot in without redesign.
